problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
